name: Mushrif Park Skill Track – MTB Dubai (Trail recorded to
snippet: 14 Feb 2026 — This trail is located just before the entrance gate of Mushrif Park , so you do not need to pay the park entrance fee to access the Skill Track.

name: ‎‏I enjoyed mountain biking in Mushrif National Park, the first
snippet: I enjoyed mountain biking in Mushrif National Park , the first mountain bike trail in the heart of Dubai with a length of 50 kilometers.
